'''Rooarwaa''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who was once hired by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to serve aboard the smuggler's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. The cost for his services was 200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day.

==Behind the scenes==
Rooarwaa's illustration was a re-use of the picture of [[Cherioer]] from ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
